author: jtraglia
content: Hey <@199561711278227457> I was just skimming this. Yeah I like the idea. I'm glad that it just triggers the workflow, and therefore will not delay & potentially cause the release action to fail.

author: jtraglia
content: We could also run this for existing releases, eg alpha.8, alpha.9, and alpha.10

author: jtraglia
content: There are a few little things I'd like to change, such as ensuring that a release exists before continuing, but for the most part this looks good to me.

author: jtraglia
content: Maybe the `"$ref" != "$release_tag"` check is enough to handle that edge case. Will give it a proper review in a bit.

author: parithosh
content:
thank you!
yeah i didnt want to couple the two too tightly, but also didn't want to fully decouple - hence the middle path here 😄
